name: Ferrara 2 Light 5.75" Wall Sconce - SCN4069 - Gold - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Ferrara 2 Light Wall Sconce, a piece that adds elegance to any room. Crafted with gold iron, this metal fixture blends beautifully with modern and classic decor styles. It measures 5.75 inches, making it the perfect addition to hallways, living areas, or bedrooms. 

The warm glow from the two lights creates a welcoming atmosphere, enhancing the charm of your surroundings. Designed for those who appreciate style and function, this wall sconce is both an aesthetic and practical choice. 

Elevate your interior design with the Ferrara Wall Sconce and let your walls shine with sophistication. Enjoy the soft lighting that transforms any space into a serene retreat. Discover the impact of well-placed lighting with this exquisite piece, and make every evening a special occasion.
